data.title: Crypto markets rebound as Bitcoin tops $109K and Ethereum nears $2.6K
data.description:
3-7-2025 – The cryptocurrency market rebounded sharply today after two days of declines, with Bitcoin (BTC) surging 3. 12% in 24 hours to surpass the $109,000 level, according to data from SoSoValue. Ethereum (ETH) also posted significant gains, climbing 7. 03% to approach $2,600
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/crypto-markets-rebound-as-bitcoin-tops-109k-and-ethereum-nears-2-6k/

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $1.8236 million yesterday, with BlackRock ETF ETHA alone having a net outflow of $46.8863 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 2, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $1.8236 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net inflow of $25.798 million in a single day. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached $1.674 billion.
The second is Bitwise ETF ETHW, with a net inflow of $8.3283 million in a single day. Currently, ETHW's total net inflow has reached $362 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a net outflow of $46.8863 million in a single day. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached $5.531 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$10.695 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.42%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$4.249 billion.

data.title: Zhongshan Public Utility Clarifies Position on Stablecoin Licensing
data.description: According to Foresight News, Zhongshan Public Utility, a publicly listed company, has addressed inquiries regarding its potential involvement in stablecoin licensing applications. The company clarified that it currently has no plans to engage in any stablecoin-related business activities.

data.title: Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Reaches Record High
data.description: According to PANews, data from Token Terminal reveals that the supply of stablecoins on the Ethereum network has reached a new peak of $135.4 billion. This milestone marks a significant development in the cryptocurrency market, highlighting the growing reliance on stablecoins within the Ethereum ecosystem.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $408 million yesterday, with Fidelity ETF FBTC leading the way with a net inflow of $184 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 2, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$408 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$184 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.972 billion.
The second is Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a single-day net inflow of US$83.0012 million. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow has reached US$2.587 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$136.679 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 6.3%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$49.04 billion.

data.title: The Evolution of DeFi Staking – From Simple Rewards to Complex Yield Strategies
data.description:
How liquid staking and restaking are reshaping the DeFi landscape in 2025 Since its inception, the DeFi (decentralized finance) ecosystem has transformed unbelievably, with staking mechanisms evolving and no longer existing in the simple form of receiving PoS (proof-of-stake) rewards, as they are currently being advanced as quite elaborate yield-generating schemes.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/02/the-evolution-of-defi-staking-from-simple-rewards-to-complex-yield-strategies/

data.title: U.S. Lifts Export Restrictions on Chip Design Software to China
data.description:
According to Foresight News, CNBC reports that U.S. chip software manufacturer Synopsys has announced the U.S. government has lifted export restrictions on chip design software to China. Competitor Cadence has also confirmed the policy change, stating it is restoring access for affected customers to its software and technology.

Previously, on May 23, the U.S. had informed several chip design software companies that they needed to obtain licenses before exporting software and semiconductor chemicals to China.

data.title: BitMart contracts will be listed on ICNTUSDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart Contract will launch ICNTUSDT perpetual contract at 21:00 (UTC+8) on July 3, 2025, supporting up to 50 times leverage.

data.title: Avail Launches Nexus Beta to Enhance Blockchain Interoperability
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the modular blockchain project Avail has launched the Nexus Beta version. Nexus is a meta-interoperability protocol designed to address blockchain fragmentation by connecting liquidity, assets, and coordination logic at the foundational level. Operating on Avail's decentralized public blockchain network, cross-chain transactions are verified through a modular execution layer. This layer supports zero-knowledge proofs, optimistic proofs, trusted hardware, and solver-based liquidity, enabling secure and seamless asset transfers across ZK rollups, OP rollups, and sovereign blockchains
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/26428842756377?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: U.S. Stock Valuation Indicator Reaches Record High, Signaling Potential Market Risks
data.description:
According to PANews, recent data reveals that the "Buffett Indicator," a key measure of U.S. stock valuations, has surged to an unprecedented 205%, marking a historic high. This figure surpasses levels seen during the dot-com bubble and the 2008 financial crisis, indicating that market valuations are significantly overestimated. Currently, the total market capitalization of U.S. stocks exceeds twice the country's GDP.

Despite the indicator suggesting a potential market bubble, the market reaction has been relatively subdued. As trading commenced in the second half of 2025, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 426 points (1%), the S&P 500 remained largely unchanged, and the Nasdaq Composite Index fell by 0.6%. Investors have shifted funds from technology stocks like Microsoft and Nvidia to healthcare stocks such as Amgen, Merck, and UnitedHealth, which saw gains of nearly 3%, with Johnson & Johnson also rising by almost 2%.

The elevated level of the Buffett Indicator suggests that the market may face adjustment risks, prompting investors and analysts to closely monitor future trends. The coming months will be crucial in determining whether the market can sustain its current high valuations or if a correction is imminent.

data.title: Four Republicans object to procedural vote on Trump tax bill
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Wall Street Journal, on Wednesday night local time, Republican leaders in the U.S. House of Representatives suffered a setback on Trump's tax and spending bill, and the party's slim majority once again created last-minute drama on Capitol Hill. Four Republican lawmakers - Keith Self, Victoria Spatz, Andrew Clyde and Brian Fitzpatrick - joined Democrats in voting against a procedural "rule" vote, preventing the Republican Party from entering the final stage of passage, at least for now. The procedural vote lasted until late at night, lasting more than 7 hours, and is said to be the longest vote in the history of the House of Representatives. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Circle Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, data from Solscan indicates that Circle minted approximately 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain. This transaction occurred at 3:13 a.m. on July 3, 2025, UTC+8.

data.title: Sui Emerges as Fastest Growing L1 Developer Community
data.description:
According to PANews, recent data shared by Sam Blackshear, co-founder and CTO of Mysten Labs, reveals that Sui has become the second fastest-growing Layer 1 (L1) developer community over the past year, with a growth rate of 16.1%. This places it just behind Solana, which experienced a 17.7% increase. Over the past two years, Sui's developer community has grown by 54%, ranking it as the fastest-growing in this category.

This growth stands in stark contrast to the overall trend in the cryptocurrency industry, where the total number of developers has decreased by approximately 20% over the past year. All major Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) L1 developer communities have experienced negative growth during this period.

data.title: Avail Launches Nexus Beta to Enhance Blockchain Interoperability
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the modular blockchain project Avail has launched the Nexus Beta version. Nexus is a meta-interoperability protocol designed to address blockchain fragmentation by connecting liquidity, assets, and coordination logic at the foundational level.

Operating on Avail's decentralized public blockchain network, cross-chain transactions are verified through a modular execution layer. This layer supports zero-knowledge proofs, optimistic proofs, trusted hardware, and solver-based liquidity, enabling secure and seamless asset transfers across ZK rollups, OP rollups, and sovereign blockchains.

Web3 application developers can now access the Nexus SDK in advance, allowing for the free movement of assets, users, and liquidity within applications and across native chains.

data.title: The crypto market stabilized and rebounded, BTC broke through $109,000, and ETH rose by more than 7%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market rebounded after two consecutive days of correction, with a general increase of about 2% to 9%. Among them, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 3.12% in 24 hours, breaking through the $109,000 mark. Ethereum (ETH) rose 7.03%, approaching $2,600. At the same time, MAG7.ssi rose 4.39%, DEFI.ssi rose 7.39%, and MEME.ssi rose 7.85%.
Other sectors with outstanding performance include: AI sector rose 9.06% in 24 hours, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) and ai16z (AI16Z) rose 13.33% and 16.05% respectively; Meme sector rose 8.57%, among which dogwifhat (WIF) rose 16.56%, and Bonk (BONK) rose 20.06% in 24 hours due to the news that Tuttle Capital is about to launch BONK 2x leveraged ETF; Layer2 sector rose 8.23%, Celestia (TIA) rose 17.67%; RWA sector rose 8.06%, Plume (PLUME) and Keeta (KTA) rose 18.72% and 24.07% respectively.
In addition, the DeFi sector rose by 6.59%. Within the sector, Uniswap (UNI) rose by 12.28%; the Layer1 sector rose by 4.27%, and Cardano (ADA) rose by 7.88%; the PayFi sector rose by 3.15%, and Stellar (XLM) rose by 5.20%; the CeFi sector rose by 2.61%, and Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose by 8.31%.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, shows that the ssiAI, ssiGameFi, and ssiLayer2 indexes rose by 9.35%, 9.25%, and 8.52% respectively in 24 hours.
